item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly brakes in the first sentence, refuses a new standing door-access channel, names the repeated prior pattern of queue/group/entry splits, and moves upstream to root-cause diagnosis, ownership, SLA, and exception rules. It permits only a tightly bounded one-day emergency marker, so it does not directly add the next local repair as the default."}
